name: Mud Valley Foundation
description: Mud Valley Foundation is a nonprofit based at Quinta Vale da Lama, Odiáxere, Lagos, SW Algarve, Portugal, focused on education and action-oriented initiatives for ecosystem restoration in southwestern Portugal. It runs the Ecosystem Regeneration Mondays volunteer program, the Ecosystem Regeneration Camp, and the Barlavento Ecosystem Regeneration Community, and hosts a Bioregional Learning Center for southwestern Portugal.
mission: To reverse the effects of desertification in the SW Algarve bioregion by building soil health, water availability, biodiversity, and regenerative local livelihoods through education and community action.
full_address: Quinta Vale da Lama, EM534, 8600-258 Odiáxere, Lagos, PORTUGAL
